overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character running through a rainy night at a wooden harbor dock. The character navigates through covered walkways and open cargo areas with wagons and industrial warehouses, illuminated by gas lamps and building lights.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet wooden dock at night, approaching a covered walkway entrance. The metal-sided industrial building looms on the right while dark water is visible to the left beyond a wooden railing.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow covered walkway with wooden walls on the right and support beams on the left. Overhead electric lights illuminate the path as the character runs toward the distant exit.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character enters a wide open dock area under the night sky. Wooden wagons, cargo crates, and gas lamps dot the waterfront, with a large steamboat visible in the distant harbor and an industrial warehouse looming ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered passage between a red wooden building and a warehouse, then emerges into an open area near a large brick warehouse with A.D. Co. signage. Wooden wagons now appear on the left as the character continues forward.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow waterfront walkway with a tall brick warehouse wall on the right and the harbor edge on the left. Distant lights from across the harbor illuminate the rainy night as the character continues along the dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy harbor at night, transitioning from narrow industrial corridors to wide, open dockyards. It begins with the character running along a wet wooden dock beside a metal-sided building before moving into a narrow covered walkway illuminated by overhead electric lights. As the character emerges from the walkway, the scene expands into a wide waterfront area filled with wooden wagons, cargo crates, and a distant steamboat under the dark sky. The camera then follows the character through a tight passage between a red wooden building and a warehouse, opening up again near a large brick structure marked with A.D. Co. signage. Finally, the path narrows once more into a waterfront walkway, flanked by a tall brick wall and the harbor edge, with distant lights shimmering across the rainy water.
